body.raw:
{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/llm/token",
    "httpMethod": "patch",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "timeout": 10000,
    "requestBody": "{\"prompt\": [\"您好这种情况一般称为面挤挛与精神因素有密切的关系的轻微的一段时间可以自行恢复。这种情况应该是神经性的可以到神经内科或者针灸科检查治疗一般来说效果应该是有的药物一般可以用卡马西平等治疗避免精神紧张避免劳累希望我的回答对您有帮助祝早日康复\"] }"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "uri": "/v1/chat/completions",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "timeout": 10000,
    "requestBody": "{\"messages\": [{\"role\": \"system\",\"content\": \"You are a helpful assistant.\"},{\"role\": \"user\",\"content\": \"who are you?\"}]}"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService_Stream",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "uri": "/v1/chat/completions",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "timeout": 10000,
    "requestBody": "{\"stream\":true,\"messages\": [{\"role\": \"system\",\"content\": \"You are a helpful assistant.\"},{\"role\": \"user\",\"content\": \"who are you?\"}]}"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/me5s/domain",
    "timeout": 10000,
    "requestBody": "{\"batch_text\": [\"Bump the brightness up to 90 percent.\"] }"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/me5s/copynet",
    "timeout": 100000,
    "requestBody": "{\"batch_text\": [\"please introduce the lenovo company\"] }"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/me5s/completion",
    "timeout": 100000,
    "requestBody": "{\"batch_text\": [\"please introduce the lenovo company\",\"hello world\"] }"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/me5s/retrieval",
    "timeout": 10000000,
    "requestBody": "{\"batch_text\": [\"韩国人去香港要签证吗\"] }"
}

{
    "serverName": "modelService",
    "methodName": "modelServiceMethod",
    "httpMethod": "post",
    "headers": null,
    "parameters": null,
    "uri": "/app/v1/infer/clip/text_completion",
    "timeout": 100000,
    "requestBody": "{\"text\": \"please introduce the lenovo company\" }"
}
